input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

final_answer: IC.4.3.3 Submit the ETC Notice of Intent and ETC Systems Form as given in section DR - Document
